message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 15:30
The train should leave on sunday and should go to london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve vietnamese food and should be in the west
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 11:30 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
